svg.title: Sixteen Disparate Views of Fibonacci Truth
svg.desc: A 4 by 4 SVG atlas under the repository Fv process-step convention. It separates exact recurrence values, finite ratios, limits, geometry approximations, evidence boundaries, index conversion, and metaphor. No finite ratio is claimed to equal phi exactly.
svg.text: SIXTEEN DISPARATE VIEWS OF FIBONACCI TRUTH
Repository Fv convention · exact values, finite ratios, limits, geometry, metaphor, and evidence boundaries kept separate
Zero and duplicate 1 are distinct process steps.
Later terms are implicit in seeds + rule, not real-world fate.
Fv -1..12; linear bars compress early growth.
Plot (D_(v-1), D_v): edges become slope ratios.
Finite R_v are rational; none equals φ exactly.
Q_v approaches 1/φ; finite values remain finite.
R_v - φ alternates sign while magnitude shrinks.
Log-style view: closeness grows, exact equality never occurs.
A reference rectangle is not a finite Fibonacci ratio.
Quarter-circle square construction, not exact logarithmic spiral.
Markers are observations; dashed links show order only.
Interpretive coordinate; unequal distances around today.
Do not change a truth into a stronger kind.
Question answered: which truths are different kinds?
Caption: Values use canonical repository Fv convention over Fv -1..28 where applicable. Geometry is approximate; time is metaphor; finite ratios only approach φ.
